2603.22871.title: Dynamical Systems Theory Behind a Hierarchical Reasoning Model
2603.22871.paper_summary: Current large language models (LLMs) primarily rely on linear sequence generation and massive parameter counts, yet they severely struggle with complex algorithmic reasoning. While recent reasoning architectures, such as the Hierarchical Reasoning Model (HRM) and Tiny Recursive Model (TRM), demonstrate that compact recursive networks can tackle these tasks, their training dynamics often lack rigorous mathematical guarantees, leading to instability and representational collapse. We propose the Contraction Mapping Model (CMM), a novel architecture that reformulates discrete recursive reasoning into continuous Neural Ordinary and Stochastic Differential Equations (NODEs/NSDEs). By explicitly enforcing the convergence of the latent phase point to a stable equilibrium state and mitigating feature collapse with a hyperspherical repulsion loss, the CMM provides a mathematically grounded and highly stable reasoning engine. On the Sudoku-Extreme benchmark, a 5M-parameter CMM achieves a state-of-the-art accuracy of 93.7 %, outperforming the 27M-parameter HRM (55.0 %) and 5M-parameter TRM (87.4 %). Remarkably, even when aggressively compressed to an ultra-tiny footprint of just 0.26M parameters, the CMM retains robust predictive power, achieving 85.4 % on Sudoku-Extreme and 82.2 % on the Maze benchmark. These results establish a new frontier for extreme parameter efficiency, proving that mathematically rigorous latent dynamics can effectively replace brute-force scaling in artificial reasoning.
2603.22871.paper_summary_zh: 目前的大型語言模型（LLMs）主要依賴線性序列生成和大量參數計數，但在複雜的算法推理方面卻面臨嚴重挑戰。雖然最近的推理架構，如層次推理模型（HRM）和微型遞歸模型（TRM），顯示出緊湊的遞歸網絡能夠處理這些任務，但它們的訓練動態往往缺乏嚴謹的數學保證，導致不穩定和表徵崩潰。我們提出了收縮映射模型（CMM），這是一種新穎的架構，將離散的遞歸推理重新構造為連續的神經常微分方程和隨機微分方程（NODEs/NSDEs）。通過明確強制潛在相位點收斂到穩定的平衡狀態，並通過超球體排斥損失來減輕特徵崩潰，CMM 提供了一個數學上扎實且高度穩定的推理引擎。在 Sudoku-Extreme 基準測試中，一個 5M 參數的 CMM 實現了 93.7% 的最先進準確率，超越了 27M 參數的 HRM（55.0%）和 5M 參數的 TRM（87.4%）。值得注意的是，即使在極度壓縮到僅 0.26M 參數的超小型佔用空間時，CMM 仍然保持強大的預測能力，在 Sudoku-Extreme 上達到 85.4% 和在 Maze 基準測試上達到 82.2%。這些結果為極端參數效率建立了一個新前沿，證明了數學上嚴謹的潛在動態可以有效替代人工推理中的暴力擴展。
2603.22871.author: Vasiliy A. Es'kin et.al.
2603.22871.authors: Vasiliy A. Es'kin, Mikhail E. Smorkalov
